## Summary
- add standalone `corpus/public-domain/clean/the-awakening.txt` as the canonical Kate Chopin fixture
- remove empty `story-of-an-hour` raw/clean placeholders
- remove the broken `story-of-an-hour` manifest entry
- update `the-awakening` manifest paths to use `raw/the-awakening.txt` and `clean/the-awakening.txt`
- mark The Awakening as cleaned/no extraction required and update the manifest note

## Why
The existing `story-of-an-hour` fixture was incorrect: Gutenberg #160 is The Awakening and Selected Short Stories, not a standalone Story of an Hour source. This PR substitutes The Awakening as the active Kate Chopin long-form calibration fixture and removes the misleading Story of an Hour residue.

## Files
- `corpus/public-domain/clean/the-awakening.txt`
- `corpus/public-domain/manifest.public-domain.json`
- removed `corpus/public-domain/clean/story-of-an-hour.txt`
- removed `corpus/public-domain/raw/story-of-an-hour.txt`

## Note
The manifest now points to `corpus/public-domain/raw/the-awakening.txt` for schema/path consistency, but this PR only adds the cleaned standalone text file. A raw standalone source can be added separately if the corpus downloader/validator requires physical raw-file presence.
